list.title: Bills
list.description: Credit and cash stock purchases in one place.

empty.title: No purchases yet
empty.description: Record a cash purchase or add a credit purchase from the buttons above. New bills will appear here.
empty.no_matching_message: Try clearing filters or widening the date range.

modal.allocations_hint: ₹{{settled}} is already applied from one or more settlements. You can edit this bill, but the new total cannot go below that amount, and you cannot change the lender until those links are removed or reallocated.
modal.allocations_heading: Payments / settlements linked to this purchase
modal.allocations_empty: No settlement amounts are linked to this purchase yet.
modal.manage_settlements_hint: ₹{{settled}} of ₹{{total}} is already applied. View history or record a new payment.
modal.add_settlement_heading: Record a payment toward this bill
modal.add_settlement_remaining: Up to ₹{{amount}} can still be applied to this bill.

settlement_modal.title: Payments & settlements
settlement_modal.not_credit: Settlements apply only to credit purchases.
settlement_modal.subtitle: {{date}} · {{lender}}

toasts.total_below_settled: The bill total cannot be less than what is already settled (₹{{min}}). Raise line amounts or change settlements in the ledger.
toasts.settlement_exceeds_remaining: That amount is more than you can apply to this bill right now (max ₹{{max}}).
